text: A photograph of Washington D.C. at night time.
A man walking across a street near a light pole.
A small herd of sheep along the road in a desert.
The snow skier is jumping a small hill.
Traffic is passing through an intersection in front of a building at night.
A cat lying on a ledge with empty pots behind it.
A white dog is sitting on a bench and there is another white dog in front of him and both have muzzles on their mouths.
Some raw looking meat is with cooked broccoli.
The two women are standing underneath a pink umbrella as it rains.
Three red double decker busses going through London.
